protocolInfo.title: The Daily Ritual
protocolInfo.text: Usage instructions: The 1:10 protocol means you mix 1 part AmberNord essence with 10 parts water (still or sparkling). Best enjoyed in the morning on an empty stomach to ensure optimal cellular absorption. Always shake well before use.

manifest.lead: We live in an era of synthetic shortcuts. Conventional energy drinks and artificial stimulants lend the body energy that it must later repay with interest.
manifest.body: This is precisely where AmberNord begins — the answer to genuine cellular performance. Not a short-term kick, but a biological upgrade. We extract the purest essence of the nordic wilderness to bring you a tool for sustainable biohacking and deep regeneration directly to Switzerland.

ritualBlock.h2:
One part gold.
Ten parts life.
ritualBlock.lead: Most nutritional supplements are synthetically isolated, and conventional health drinks are full of hidden sugar. AmberNord takes a completely different path.
ritualBlock.body: We offer you an uncompromisingly pure, highly concentrated raw essence – designed for perfect cellular alchemy with water. The 1:10 protocol (1 part essence, 10 parts water) is your daily catalyst. In this symbiosis, the rare Omega fatty acids, amino acids and natural Vitamin C are absorbed by the body to the maximum. The result: deep hydration, measurably sharper focus and robust cellular protection.

sourcing.h2:
The source of the elixir.
Our plantation.
sourcing.text: We leave nothing to chance. Our raw materials do not come from the anonymous global market, but from a single organic plantation personally selected by us. After a careful selection, we chose precisely this rare variety – grown in a microclimate whose purity and mineral richness give the juice its unmistakable character. Here, berries are produced with a nutrient density that sets new standards.

craft.text: From the moment of gentle hand-picking to cold-pressing at the source, only a moment passes. No industrial harvesting machines touch our fruit – so the delicate skin of the berries remains intact. We embrace whole-berry use: the entire berry – from the nutrient-rich skin to the valuable seed – is fully utilized. In this way, we preserve the precious Omega-7 oil and over 190 bioactive compounds in their purest form.
